title: Make plan/python installable
summary: Add package metadata for plan/python and install watchtower_plan through the shared core/python workspace without a second environment.
scope_items: Add package metadata for watchtower_plan under plan/python/.
Wire the shared core/python workspace to install the plan-owned package.
Keep the shared environment model intact without introducing a second venv.
done_when_items: watchtower_plan installs through the shared core/python workspace without ad hoc sys.path mutation.
The lockfile and onboarding docs match the new workspace contract.
